2026-04-08T17:38:39.3334804Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T17:38:39.3338505Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T17:38:39.3340387Z 
2026-04-08T17:38:39.3340988Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T17:38:39.3341577Z
